comment: Sync-bus heartbeat. Each node updates its entry on every push. See .sync/BUS.md.

claude-local.focus: Player de-dupe (1.8.4): removed .player__meta (title+artist) from the player bar — it duplicated the card/hero heading right above it. Spacer that right-aligns mini/snap/time moved from .player__meta(margin-right:auto) to .player__mini(margin-left:auto); bar is now [play]…[mini][time] (and …[snap][time] playing). Title/artist still in player aria-label. Verified paused+playing in harness. (Open: buy/donate URLs; real artwork/audio; mobile listen-test.)
